REPLY REPLY TO RESPONDENT BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERSITYS OPPOSITION TO PETITION FOR LEAVE TO FILE ACTION AGAINST SAN FRANCISCO STATE UNIVERSITY (TRANSACTION ID # 57319093) FILED BY PETITIONER CHILI, ENRICA

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER ENRICA CHILI'S PETITION FOR LEAVE TO FILE ACTION AGAINST RESPONDENT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 28, 2015 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE PETITIONER'S COUNSEL TIME TO OBTAIN A DECLARATION FROM PLAINTIFF'S UNCLE IN SUPPORT OF THE PETITION. PETITIONER TO EXPLAIN WHAT COMPETENT EVIDENCE SUPPORTS HER PETITION. UNDER CCP 446, THE COUNSEL-VERIFIED PETITION CANNOT BE CONSIDERED AN AFFIDAVIT/DECLARATION. PETITIONER'S COUNSEL WAS GIVEN UNTIL JULY 17 TO FILE AND SERVE PAPERS AND ADDITIONAL 5 COURT DAYS FOR THE RESPONDENT TO FILE A RESPONSE. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO CSR # 7489 (302/EHG)
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 57559019) FILED BY PETITIONER CHILI, ENRICA
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 57763470) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHILI, ENRICA
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-08-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-28-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER CHILI, ENRICA AS TO RESPONDENT SAN FRANCISCO STATE UNIVERSITY

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ENRICA CHILI'S PETITION TO FILE IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 23, 2015 TO GIVE PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JUNE 8, 2015 AT 4:00 PM. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

RESPONDENT BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERSITYS SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION TO PETITION FOR LEAVE TO FILE ACTION AGAINST SAN FRANCISCO STATE UNIVERSITY (TRANSACTION ID # 57604652) FILED BY DEFENDANT BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERSITY (ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS SAN FRANCISCO STATE UNIVERSITY)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ENRICA CHILI'S HEARING ON PETITION TO FILE, THE MOTION IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS NO PREJUDICE TO SAN FRANCISCO STATE UNIVERSITY. THE COURT FINDS PETITIONER'S EVIDENCE TO BE ADMISSIBLE AND CREDIBLE, AND TO MAKE A STRONG, CLEAR SHOWING OF INADVERTANCE AND INCAPACITY. THE COURT FINDS THE PETITIONER'S UNCLE MOVED AS EXPEDITIOUSLY AS POSSIBLE. PETITIONER TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT INCLUDES THE COURT'S FINDINGS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
ORDER - PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS DENIED (A146451 DIV. 2)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To File
Off Calendar Jul-28-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. JEREMY M. JESSUP, ESQ. of the Dolan Law Firm, Tel No. 415-421-2800 appearing for Petitioner Enrica Chili;
Attys. GREGORY D. BROWN, ESQ. and BRIAN R. THOMPSON, ESQ. of Burnham Brown, Tel No. 510-444-6800 appearing for Respondent San Francisco State University.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling, and stated additional findings. As to PETITIONER ENRICA CHILI'S Hearing On Petition To File, the motion is granted. The Court finds no prejudice to San Francisco State University. The Court finds Petitioner's evidence to be admissible and credible, and to make a strong, clear showing of inadvertance and incapacity. The Court finds the Petitioner's uncle moved as expeditiously as possible. Petitioner to prepare and submit a proposed order that includes the Court's findings. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To File
Off Calendar Jun-23-2015 Continued To Jul-28-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JEREMY M. JESSUP OF THE DOLAN LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-415-421-2800 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. BRIAN R. THOMPSON & ATTY. GREGORY D. BROWN OF THE BURNHAM/BROWN LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (510) 835-6810 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PETITIONER ENRICA CHILI'S Petition for Leave To File Action against Respondent is continued to July 28, 2015 to give petitioner's counsel time to obtain a declaration from plaintiff's uncle in support of the petition. Petitioner to explain what competent evidence supports her petition. Under CCP 446, the counsel-verified petition cannot be considered an affidavit/declaration. Petitioner's counsel was given until July 17 to file and serve papers and additional 5 court days for the Respondent to file a response. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR # 7489 =302/ehg

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To File
Off Calendar Jun-08-2015 Continued To Jun-23-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER ENRICA CHILI'S Petition To File is continued to June 23, 2015 to give plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 8, 2015 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
